sentences.en: Stretch your arms up high and start the day.
sentences.zh: 把手臂往上伸展，開始新的一天吧。
sentences.ipa: /strɛtʃ jɔːr ɑːrmz ʌp haɪ ænd stɑːrt ðə deɪ/

sentences.en: Let's set the table with forks and spoons.
sentences.zh: 我們用叉子和湯匙來擺餐具吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts sɛt ðə ˈteɪbəl wɪð fɔːrks ænd spuːnz/

sentences.en: Squeeze the sponge and scrub your knees.
sentences.zh: 擠一擠海綿，把膝蓋刷乾淨。
sentences.ipa: /skwiːz ðə spʌndʒ ænd skrʌb jɔːr niːz/

sentences.en: Let's catch the train to the aquarium.
sentences.zh: 我們搭火車去水族館吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts kætʃ ðə treɪn tə ðə əˈkwɛriəm/

sentences.en: Grab the rope and climb up carefully.
sentences.zh: 抓住繩子，小心地往上爬。
sentences.ipa: /ɡræb ðə roʊp ænd klaɪm ʌp ˈkɛrfəli/

sentences.en: Pack your crayons in your pencil case.
sentences.zh: 把你的蠟筆收進鉛筆盒裡。
sentences.ipa: /pæk jɔːr ˈkreɪɑːnz ɪn jɔːr ˈpɛnsəl keɪs/

sentences.en: Write each spelling word three times.
sentences.zh: 每個拼字單字寫三遍。
sentences.ipa: /raɪt iːtʃ ˈspɛlɪŋ wɜːrd θriː taɪmz/

sentences.en: Let your friend have a turn with the blocks.
sentences.zh: 讓你的朋友也玩一下積木吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛt jɔːr frɛnd hæv ə tɜːrn wɪð ðə blɑːks/

sentences.en: Squeeze my hand if you feel scared.
sentences.zh: 如果你覺得害怕，就握緊我的手。
sentences.ipa: /skwiːz maɪ hænd ɪf juː fiːl skɛrd/

sentences.en: We clean up first, then we can play.
sentences.zh: 我們先收拾好，才可以玩。
sentences.ipa: /wiː kliːn ʌp fɜːrst ðɛn wiː kæn pleɪ/

sentences.en: You shared without being asked, wonderful!
sentences.zh: 你不用別人提醒就主動分享，太棒了！
sentences.ipa: /juː ʃɛrd wɪˈðaʊt ˈbiːɪŋ æskt ˈwʌndərfəl/

sentences.en: Hold the railing as you walk downstairs.
sentences.zh: 下樓梯的時候要扶著扶手。
sentences.ipa: /hoʊld ðə ˈreɪlɪŋ æz juː wɔːk ˌdaʊnˈstɛrz/

sentences.en: Let the nurse check your temperature.
sentences.zh: 讓護理師幫你量體溫。
sentences.ipa: /lɛt ðə nɜːrs tʃɛk jɔːr ˈtɛmpərətʃər/

sentences.en: Give your cousin a warm welcome.
sentences.zh: 給你的表親一個熱情的歡迎吧。
sentences.ipa: /ɡɪv jɔːr ˈkʌzən ə wɔːrm ˈwɛlkəm/

sentences.en: Ask your friend how his day was.
sentences.zh: 問問你的朋友今天過得怎麼樣。
sentences.ipa: /æsk jɔːr frɛnd haʊ hɪz deɪ wʌz/

sentences.en: Cover your mouth when you yawn.
sentences.zh: 打哈欠的時候要摀住嘴巴。
sentences.ipa: /ˈkʌvər jɔːr maʊθ wɛn juː jɔːn/

sentences.en: It's drizzling, bring a light jacket.
sentences.zh: 外面下著毛毛雨，帶件薄外套吧。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts ˈdrɪzəlɪŋ brɪŋ ə laɪt ˈdʒækɪt/

sentences.en: One more level, then the game goes off.
sentences.zh: 再玩一關，然後就要關掉遊戲囉。
sentences.ipa: /wʌn mɔːr ˈlɛvəl ðɛn ðə ɡeɪm ɡoʊz ɔːf/

sentences.en: Let's light the candles on the cake.
sentences.zh: 我們來點蛋糕上的蠟燭吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts laɪt ðə ˈkændəlz ɑːn ðə keɪk/

sentences.en: Let's read a bedtime story under the blanket.
sentences.zh: 我們躲在被子裡讀一個睡前故事吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts riːd ə ˈbɛdtaɪm ˈstɔːri ˈʌndər ðə ˈblæŋkɪt/
